impact: This advances the PP&D plan by tying extracted requirements, missing-information detection, formal stop gates, and guarded Playwright drafting into one deterministic agent-planning fixture without live DevHub access or private artifacts.
summary: Add a fixture-only formal-logic planner guardrail bundle and syntax-valid validator for one PP&D requirement, missing user fact, stop gate, and reversible draft-only Playwright preview action.
target_task: Task checkbox-87: Task checkbox-82: Add a formal-logic planner integration fixture that maps one extracted PP&D requirement, one missing user fact, one stop gate, and one reversible draft-only Playwright action into a single agent guardrail bundle.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
